title: T-043 — QA-009 ncr_list page (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-043 — QA-009 ncr_list page (parity)

PRD: §8.5 traceability QA-040 ↔ UX QA-009 ↔ prototype `ncr_list`; §8.3 QUA-105 NCR P1 promotion; §7.1 Epic 8D
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:3-123 (ncr_list)

## Goal
Server-rendered NCR list page with KPI strip + kanban strip + filter bar + bulk-action toolbar, 1:1 parity vs prototype.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/app/quality/ncr/page.tsx (RSC) — Drizzle aggregations in parallel (Promise.all)
2. URL searchParams: status, severity, type, search, page → server WHERE chain
3. Kanban strip = 4 status columns, click appends ?status= via router.push
4. Bulk select client-only UI; bulk-assign Server Action with array; bulk-export Route Handler
5. Overdue highlight server-computed (response_due_at < now())
6. Export Route Handler /api/quality/ncr/export streams CSV + INSERTs quality_audit_log row (audit-on-export)

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:3-123` (ncr_list).
Parity checklist (verify all):
- 4-card KPI strip (open / overdue / avg resolution 30d / closed today)
- 4-column kanban strip (draft/open/investigating/closed) with counts and click=filter
- Filter bar: status/severity/type/search (shadcn Tabs+Select+Input)
- Table cols: NCR#, type, severity, title, reference, assigned, response_due, status, actions
- Overdue row highlight (red bg)
- Bulk select checkbox column + bulk-assign + bulk-export buttons
- Create NCR CTA top-right
- Export CSV button (audit-logged)

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/ncr/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/NcrListClient.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/NcrKpiStrip.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/NcrKanbanStrip.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ncr/__tests__/NcrListClient.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/quality/ncr/export/route.ts [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:3-123 — parity on structure, visuals, interaction (RTL + checklist)
2. ?status=open&severity=critical filters rows and updates kanban counts; avg resolution server-computed
3. role=auditor_readonly hides bulk + Create CTA, keeps Export
4. Export CSV inserts a quality_audit_log row with op='EXPORT' + filter params

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: NcrListClient.test.tsx asserting all 4 ACs + parity checklist + export audit
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test NcrListClient'
- For parity: capture screenshots + Playwright trace where applicable; attach paths in closeout

## Risk red lines
- No native HTML select / checkbox outside shadcn
- No client-side avg-resolution compute
- Export-is-itself-an-audit-event (translation-notes-quality §M-12)
- No prototype JSX paste — RSC + shadcn translation

pipeline_inputs.description: QA-009 NCR list page server-rendered with kanban-strip + filter bar + bulk-action toolbar, 1:1 parity vs prototype `ncr_list` (quality/ncr-screens.jsx:3-123).
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component apps/web/src/app/quality/ncr/page.tsx loads via Drizzle: status aggregation (GROUP BY status with FILTER for overdue), 4-card KPI strip (open count / overdue count / avg resolution 30d / closed today), filtered rows. URL searchParams drive WHERE clause: status, severity, type, search, page. Kanban strip = 4 columns (draft/open/investigating/closed) with counts and click = router.push appending status searchParam. Bulk select is client-only UI; bulk-export uses /api/quality/ncr/export Route Handler streaming CSV with same filter params; bulk-assign calls Server Action with array. Overdue row highlight: server-computed boolean (response_due_at < now() AND status NOT IN closed,cancelled). Translation-notes red-lines: no client-side resolution avg compute; pagination is cursor-based; export is itself audit-logged. Prototype parity AC anchored at `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:3-123`.
out_of_scope: Do not implement CAPA workflow (P2 Epic 8G)
acceptance_criteria: Given the NCR list page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/ncr-screens.jsx:3-123 (ncr_list), then it matches on structural parity (4-card KPI strip + 4-column kanban strip + filter bar with status/severity/type/search + table with bulk select + overdue row highlight + Export button + Create NCR CTA), visual parity (shadcn Table/Tabs/Input/Select/Checkbox/Badge/Button only, no native HTML <select>), and interaction parity (URL searchParams drive filters, kanban click filters table, bulk-assign Server Action, Export CSV via Route Handler) — verified by RTL render plus the parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details

Given URL ?status=open&severity=critical, when page renders, then only matching NCR rows appear and the kanban 'open' column shows that count; the 'avg resolution' KPI is computed server-side from rolling 30d window
Given role=auditor_readonly, when the page renders, then bulk-action toolbar is hidden, Create NCR CTA is hidden, but Export CSV remains visible (read-only export is allowed)

Given the user clicks Export CSV with filter ?status=open, when the Route Handler responds, then the CSV is streamed with the same filtered rows and a quality_audit_log row exists with op='EXPORT' and notes containing the filter params (export is itself an audit event)
test_strategy: RED: NcrListClient.test.tsx asserting parity (KPI + kanban + filter + bulk toolbar) + URL-driven filters + role-based toolbar hide + export audit log entry before implementation
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not use native HTML <select> or <input type=checkbox> outside shadcn primitives
Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to RSC + shadcn
Do not compute avg resolution on client — server SQL only
Do not skip the export audit log row (export-is-itself-an-audit-event per translation-notes-quality §M-12)
